creator: timbob@bigpond.com
text:
To test the Isabelle installation (and Proofgeneral, and Poly/ML):
1) type Isabelle
   xemacs should open with the Proofgeneral splash screen (a cartoon
   image of a general smoking a cigar).
2) choose Open and select one of the files from
      /usr/local/share/isabelle/src/HOL/ex
   for example: Sudoku.thy
3) It should load with the mathematical symbols (not equal to,
   conjunction wedge, etc.) displayed correctly
4) Press Ctrl-c, Ctrl-n to start Isabelle
5) Press Ctrl-c, Ctrl-n to step through the statements, which become
   gradually highlighted in blue, as various data is displayed in the
   lower panel.
